Class Map

java.lang.Object
logic.world.Map
public class Map extends Object
Immutable data record for one game level's tile layout and point-of-interest positions.

Tile type codes used in getTiles():

  • 0 — empty (impassable void)
  • 1 — floor (walkable)
  • 2 — wall (blocks movement)
  • 3 — quest terminal position
  • 4 — teacher spawner
  • 5 — bullet item spawn

  • Constructor Details

    • Map

      public Map(String name, List<List<Integer>> tiles, List<List<Integer>> questPositions, List<List<Integer>> spawnPositions, List<List<Integer>> itemPositions)
      Constructs a Map with all tile and position data.
      Parameters:
      name - human-readable level name
      tiles - 20×20 grid of tile type codes
      questPositions - list of [col, row] coordinates for quest terminals
      spawnPositions - list of [col, row] coordinates for teacher spawners
      itemPositions - list of [col, row] coordinates for bullet items

  • Method Details

    • getName

      public String getName()
      Returns:
      human-readable level name parsed from the map file

    • setName

      public void setName(String name)
      Parameters:
      name - human-readable level name

    • getTiles

      public List<List<Integer>> getTiles()
      Returns:
      the 20×20 grid of tile type codes (row-major: getTiles().get(row).get(col))

    • setTiles

      public void setTiles(List<List<Integer>> tiles)
      Parameters:
      tiles - 20×20 grid of tile type codes

    • getQuestPositions

      public List<List<Integer>> getQuestPositions()
      Returns:
      list of [col, row] positions where quest terminals are placed

    • setQuestPositions

      public void setQuestPositions(List<List<Integer>> questPositions)
      Parameters:
      questPositions - list of [col, row] quest terminal positions

    • getSpawnPositions

      public List<List<Integer>> getSpawnPositions()
      Returns:
      list of [col, row] positions where teachers may spawn

    • setSpawnPositions

      public void setSpawnPositions(List<List<Integer>> spawnPositions)
      Parameters:
      spawnPositions - list of [col, row] spawner positions

    • getItemPositions

      public List<List<Integer>> getItemPositions()
      Returns:
      list of [col, row] positions where bullet items may appear

    • setItemPositions

      public void setItemPositions(List<List<Integer>> itemPositions)
      Parameters:
      itemPositions - list of [col, row] item spawn positions
